Code.Name: Advice of despatch of goods
Code.Description: Advice about a depatch and a delivery that is about to take place

Code.Name: Delivery note
Code.Description: Note about a delivery of goods or services that has taken place

Code.Name: Work statement
Code.Description: Statement about some work or service that has taken place according to a contract or order

Code.Name: Return of Goods
Code.Description: Despatch note containing goods that is to be returned to the Supplier.

Code.Name: Advice of despatch of goods, usecase 1.
Code.Description: Advice about a depatch and a delivery that is about to take place for usecase 1.

Code.Name: Advice of despatch of goods, usecase 2.
Code.Description: Advice about a depatch and a delivery that is about to take place for usecase 2.

Code.Name: Advice of despatch of goods, usecase 12.
Code.Description: Advice about a depatch and a delivery that is about to take place for usecase 12.

Code.Name: Delivery note for usecase 3.
Code.Description: Note about a delivery of goods or services that has taken place for usecase 3.

Code.Description: Note about a delivery of goods or services that has taken place for usecase 4.

Code.Name: Delivery note for usecase 5.
Code.Description: Note about a delivery of goods or services that has taken place for usecase 5.

Code.Description: Note about a delivery of goods or services that has taken place for usecase 6.

Code.Description: Note about a delivery of goods or services that has taken place for usecase 7.

Code.Description: Note about a delivery of goods or services that has taken place for usecase 8.

Code.Name: Delivery note for usecase 9.
Code.Description: Note about a delivery of goods or services that has taken place for usecase 9.

Code.Name: Delivery note for usecase 10.
Code.Description: Note about a delivery of goods or services that has taken place for usecase 10.

Code.Name: Delivery note for usecase 11.
Code.Description: Note about a delivery of goods or services that has taken place for usecase 11.

Code.Name: Work statement for usecase 3.
Code.Description: Statement about some work or service that has taken place according to a contract or order for usecase 3.

Code.Description: Statement about some work or service that has taken place according to a contract or order for usecase 4.

Code.Description: Statement about some work or service that has taken place according to a contract or order for usecase 5.
